title: erysimum capitatum subsp. angustatum
intro: Erysimum capitatum subsp. angustatum, also known as Sierra wallflower, is a perennial plant in the family Brassicaceae that is native to the Sierra Nevada mountain range in California. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sierra wallflower include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Sierra wallflower can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies for various health issues.
